# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change at a high level.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Maintenance

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes
- [ ] Relevant package or integration tests were added or updated
- [ ] Documentation and JSDoc were updated where needed
- [ ] Changeset added when a published package release is affected

## Related Issues

Link the issue, discussion, or follow-up work here.

## Notes for Reviewers

Call out any risk, migration detail, or areas that deserve extra review attention.
